question_text: Which of the following lists the planets in the correct order from the Sun?
options: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune
Venus, Mercury, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Neptune, Uranus
Mercury, Earth, Venus, Mars, Saturn, Jupiter, Uranus, Neptune
Mercury, Venus, Mars, Earth, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune
correct_answer: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune
explanation: The eight planets orbit the Sun in a specific order based on their distance from it. The inner rocky planets (Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars) are closest, followed by the outer gas giants (Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune). A helpful mnemonic is 'My Very Educated Mother Just Served Us Noodles'.
